title: malva lusitanica subsp. lusitanica
intro: Malva lusitanica subsp. lusitanica, also known as the Mallow, is a perennial plant species in the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. The health benefits of Malva lusitanica subsp. lusitanica include its ability to calm irritated skin, reduce menstrual cramps, and act as a natural expectorant to help clear congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
